faqs.question: Is it worth pursuing BDes at FDDI Rohtak?
faqs.answer: Pursuing BDes at FDDI Rohtak can be worth considering as the Institute is well-reputed. FDDI Rohtak is accredited by Shoes and Allied Trade Research (SATRA), UK and is recognised by the National Council for Vocational Training (NCVT). The Institute has made several collaborations with top-notch institutions such as Tomas Bata University, Czech Republic and Footwear Manufacturers and Export Associations (Bangladesh). BDes is offered in specialisations such as Footwear Design and Production and Fashion Design.

faqs.question: How to get a seat for admission at Footwear Design and Development Institute, Rohtak?
faqs.answer:
To secure a seat at Footwear Design and Development Institute, Rohtak, students can check the following steps presented below:
Visit the official website and complete the online application process.

The selection criteria is entrance-based followed by counselling.
Upon selected, pay the specified fee to confirm and secure your seat.

faqs.question: How do I apply for admission to various courses at Footwear Design and Development Institute, Rohtak?
faqs.answer:
Footwear Design and Development Institute, Rohtak application forms are also available online. Candidates meeting the eligibility criteria can apply for the preferred course. Below are the steps to apply for admission:
Step 1: Visit the official FDDI, Rohtak website (fddiadmissions.qualcampus.com/) and click : Fresh Candidate to create Log In (New Log In)
Step 2: Fill the details to register for any programme. You must have a valid email ID for applying online.
Step 3: Press the button “Submit”. Once the information filled here will not be changed.
Step 4: The confirmation for the registration will also be sent on your email entered.
Step 5: Note: Kindly note the Email-ID and Date of birth as filled by the candidate will be used to login to the website to fill the online application form.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission at Footwear Design and Development Institute, Rohtak?
faqs.answer: Candidates looking for course admission at Footwear Design and Development Institute must pass in house entrance exam called FDDI AIST + Counselling for all course admission. All eligible candidates with any valid National level entrance examination scorecard such as UCEED etc. are allowed to participate in the Admission process for UG programmes for the academic session 2025-26. Students applying for the programmes offered at the college must ensure to satisfy the course-specific admission criteria as per the college's guidelines. The entire application process is in online mode.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Des. in Footwear Design and Production - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: The best government college of footwear - Sports Shoes (Fashion and Retail) in NCR - FDDI Rohtak.

review_content.Placements: The salary package offered ranges between 5 LPA - 6 LPA. Companies like Skechers, Relaxo, SSIPL, and Action etc., are the recruiters. The placement record shows that 95% of students got placed. The degree is valid for government jobs as well. Students have started their own startups in footwear.
review_content.Infrastructure: Safe environment for girl students, with full CCTV coverage. All facilities: canteen, mess, hostel, and good food. Overall, all clubs are there: sports, drama, music, photography, social club, and gym. All the labs have the latest machines on which practicals are done during semesters.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Des. in Footwear Design and Production - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Our college environment is attractive.

review_content.Placements: Our college provides regular placement offers to students. Many companies visit our college to recruit students and offer high salary packages. Around 50-70% of students get placed in our college with salary packages of 2 LPA - 3 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college has a good environment. Our campus is good. Our college is surrounded by greenery. Our campus is free from pollution. The hostel is situated on campus. The hostel rooms are spacious. The infrastructure of the hostel is good.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Des. in Fashion Design - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Our college is good for fashion studies.

review_content.Placements: Around 80% of students get placed. The highest salary package offered is 3.5 LPA - 3.7 LPA and the lowest salary package is 1.3 LPA. Many companies like Pantaloon and Exports House are our alumni. In the previous year, students have to go for industrial training for more than 2 months. All students got internships at big export houses like Sahi and Saho. A few students got placed in New Times and a few got in the Next Sourcing.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi gets connected to our laptops with limited Mb. Many labs are available for our course like pattern making lab, garment construction, tie and dye and draping lab, and different classrooms for other theory-based subjects with attached projectors. The library is available 24 hours.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Des. in Fashion Design - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: It is one of the best colleges for fashion designing.

review_content.Placements: Around 80% of students got placed with good packages. The highest package goes up to 3.5 to 4 Lacs per annum, and the lowest package is 1.2 to 1.5 Lacs per annum. Our alumni are in companies like Pantaloon, Export House, Liaison Office etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: The campus is Wi-Fi enabled. A computer lab is available with 40+ computers. A pattern-making lab, a dyeing and printing lab, garment construction, and a draping lab are available for fashion students. Footwear students have different types of labs. A library is available for all the students. Different classrooms are available for each batch with projectors. The hostel is quite big and spacious. Each room is for two students, and the hostel has sensor lights on corridors. The mess is quite good, and the food quality is good. The menu is different every day. Medical facilities are provided. We have different cafeterias, where they sell fast food and junk food. Our campus has a gym with different timings for girls and boys.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Des. in Fashion Design - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: FDDI, Rohtak is a college which stands after NIFT.

review_content.Placements: 80% students are placed in various reputed brands. Top recruiting companies are pantaloons, Shoppers Stop, Adidas, bata, under Tarun Tahiliani etc. The top role has always been of virtual merchandiser.90% students goes for internships at export, zara, bata, pantaloons etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: We have a Wi-Fi access at all over the campus. The minus point is that we can access to limited websites through it. Our campus have air conditional classes, a library, girls and boys individual mess, canteen, auditorium, labs with different sorts of machine required during the course. The hostel has dual rooms (balcony attached) with around 15 rooms on one floor and common washroom with a set of 15 bathrooms. We have water cooler on every floor, a sport room, a kitchen and a reception area. We do have a sport week and a cultural week every year and different kind of programmes every month which includes fashion show, industrial visits and a trip by college.

overview_faqs.answer: Footwear Design and Development Institute, Rohtak provides a blend of both extracurricular activities and academic curriculum. Candidates can take a look below at the student life of FDDI Rohtak:The curriculum is designed and developed by experts from eminent institutions such as the University of Northampton, IIT, and IIM. In addition to the programmes, the institute provides creative workshops, theoretical courses, case studies, expert lectures and industrial visits.All the FDDI campuses are well-equipped with modern facilities, including design studios, workshops, and IT labs that provide practical exposure to the latest technology and materials.The extracurricular activities include clubs and societies related to design, fashion, and entrepreneurship. Events such as fashion shows, exhibitions, and seminars are common on campus.

paragraphs: Footwear Design and Development Institute, Rohtakadmission 2025is open. The institute offers BDes courses at the UG level. The selection criteria are entrance-based, i.e., the All India Selection Test (AIST) followed by counselling. All eligible candidates with any valid National level entrance examination scorecard such as UCEED etc. are allowed to participate in the Admission process for UG programmes for the academic session 2025-26. To get admitted to FDDI, Rohtak, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the institute. The application process atFootwear Design and Development Institute, Rohtakis conducted online. Read the article to know more aboutFootwear Design and Development Institute, Rohtakcourse admission2025.

Footwear Design and Development Institute, Rohtak course admissionis completely entrance-based. Students seeking to apply for any of the courses offered at the university must fulfil the admission criteria of the desired programme before applying for it. Applicants need to register and appear for the accepted entrance exam before applying for the course. Students can refer to the table below to know about the eligibility and selection criteria forFootwear Design and Development Institute, Rohtak courses:
FDDI AIST+ Counselling/UCEED

Footwear Design and Development Institute, Rohtak admissionsare completely entrance-based. Candidates can register online for admission to their preferred course. The admission process at Footwear Design and Development Institute, Rohtak is as per the steps below:
STEP 1: Footwear Design and Development Institute, Rohtak Application Process 2025

The mode of application is online. Aspirants need to apply at the official website, i.e., www.fddiindia.com for admission to the BDes programme. A non-refundable application fee to pay for General/OBC (Non-Creamy)/GEN-EWS Category: INR 600 through the online payment gateway only. Non-refundable application Fee for SC/ ST/ PWD Category: INR 300 through online payment gateway only.
STEP 2: Selection
The institute admits students based on FDDI AIST + Counselling. It also considers the candidates' academic performance for final selection.
STEP 3: Admission Confirmation

The institute also releases a merit list based on the composite scores of the candidates for admission. Shortlisted aspirants need to come for document verification and pay theFootwear Design and Development Institute, Rohtak feeto confirm their seats in the institute.

reviews_list.review_title: Review of North East Frontier Technical University.

review_content.Placements: Almost 55% of students got placed in our college. The highest salary package offered was 6 LPA. The average salary package offered was 3.5 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered was 2.5 LPA. Top recruiting companies were Capgemini, Cognizant, and DXC. About 12% of students got internships from Internshala. Top roles offered were programmer and analyst.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our labs were not well-maintained. Our library and classrooms were spacious. Hostels were average. The sports ground was good. The food served in the canteen was good.

review_content.Placements: 223 people were placed in computer Science in 2021 11-12 LPA is the highest Which they offered for the students who passed with A grade level. Infosys, IBM, teach Mahindra are the companies who acquired a lot of students, my education have got me a valuable desire to my knowledge And I got many friends from different places.
review_content.Infrastructure: Labs, library are the main places we spend time in our free hours, the whole campus has free Wi-Fi network, hostel facilites are not good though wardens are strict and they usually makes argue with other state students northidian people are very bad in hostels they always ought with us.

reviews_list.review_title: Amazing place for students who want to make a successful career..

They provide a semester-based study programme. Professional courses are also available. According to me, it's a perfect university if you are interested in the Science field.
review_content.Infrastructure: All the facilities are available. The campus is fully covered by CCTV. Wi-Fi is available. The library is huge and the atmosphere is friendly. There is a canteen on the campus. The study room is well furnished and clean. The sitting arrangement is amazing. Everyone gets a private area to study without any disturbance.

overview_faqs.question: What do Electrical Engineering professionals do?
overview_faqs.answer: Electrical Engineering professionals are engineering jack of all trades, as they make use of their knowledge of Physics and Mathematics along with computer programming skills to develop intricate circuit systems. These circuit boards run electrical signals to and from electrical components to accomplish everything from a mundane computer startup to controlling absolute power and precision of a rocket going out of earth's atmosphere.Know more about -Electrical Engineering Courses

review_summary.college_name: North East Frontier Technical University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Aeronautical Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Review of North East Frontier Technical University.

content.Placements: Almost 55% of students got placed in our college. The highest salary package offered was 6 LPA. The average salary package offered was 3.5 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered was 2.5 LPA. Top recruiting companies were Capgemini, Cognizant, and DXC. About 12% of students got internships from Internshala. Top roles offered were programmer and analyst.
content.Infrastructure: Our labs were not well-maintained. Our library and classrooms were spacious. Hostels were average. The sports ground was good. The food served in the canteen was good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: This College is best for my education.

content.Placements: 223 people were placed in computer Science in 2021 11-12 LPA is the highest Which they offered for the students who passed with A grade level. Infosys, IBM, teach Mahindra are the companies who acquired a lot of students, my education have got me a valuable desire to my knowledge And I got many friends from different places.
content.Infrastructure: Labs, library are the main places we spend time in our free hours, the whole campus has free Wi-Fi network, hostel facilites are not good though wardens are strict and they usually makes argue with other state students northidian people are very bad in hostels they always ought with us.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Physics, Chemistry, Biology) - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Amazing place for students who want to make a successful career..

content.Placements: The college has a good and active placement cell. The fees is so low, and provide good quality education. I have joined B.Sc. in 2015. They provide a semester-based study programme. Professional courses are also available. According to me, it's a perfect university if you are interested in the Science field.
content.Infrastructure: All the facilities are available. The campus is fully covered by CCTV. Wi-Fi is available. The library is huge and the atmosphere is friendly. There is a canteen on the campus. The study room is well furnished and clean. The sitting arrangement is amazing. Everyone gets a private area to study without any disturbance.

faqs.question: What documents are required for BCom admission at NEFTU?
faqs.answer: Documents usually include Class 10 and 12 mark sheets, a passport-size photo, valid ID proof, a transfer or migration certificate, and a caste certificate (if applicable). All documents must be uploaded as per the format mentioned on the NEFTU website during the BCom application.

faqs.question: Is BBA admission at NEFTU merit-based or entrance-based?
faqs.answer: BBA admission at North East Frontier Technical University is strictly merit-based. The university does not conduct an entrance exam. Selection is based only on the candidate's performance in Class 12 from a recognised board, preferably in the commerce stream

placement_report.college_name: North East Frontier Technical University Placement & Salary Insights

placement_data.title: NEFTU Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: North East Frontier Technical University has not released the official placement report for 2023. As per the data gathered from Shikshs students' reviews, almost 55% of students were placed in recent years. Further, the highest package and average package offered during NEFTU placements were INR 6 LPA and INR 3.50 LPA , respectively. Cognizant, Capgemini, DXC Technology, and many other renowned companies offered job opportunities.

tables.context: How is the placement at NEFTU?

faqs.answer: The placement report or brochure is not out on the official website. As per the details gathered from unofficial sources, 55% of students get placed every year. The highest package and average package offered over the past few years were INR 6 LPA and INR 3.50 LPA, respectively. faqs.question: What is the highest paying job in Tourism?
faqs.answer: Food and Beverage Director and General Manager of a premier international hotel chain hold highest earning position in Tourism industry. Food & Beverage Director is responsible for managing all parts of organization's food and beverage planning and service like - menu planning costing preparing and presenting food and beverages adhering to quality and safety requirements

reviews.review_heading: Review of North East Frontier Technical University.
reviews.review_text: Our labs were not well-maintained. Our library and classrooms were spacious. Hostels were average. The sports ground was good. The food served in the canteen was good.

reviews.review_heading: This College is best for my education.
reviews.review_text: Labs, library are the main places we spend time in our free hours, the whole campus has free Wi-Fi network, hostel facilites are not good though wardens are strict and they usually makes argue with other state students northidian people are very bad in hostels they always ought with us.

reviews.review_heading: Amazing place for students who want to make a successful career..
reviews.review_text:
All the facilities are available. 
The campus is fully covered by CCTV.  
Wi-Fi is available.
The library is huge and the atmosphere is friendly. 
There is a canteen on the campus. 
The study room is well furnished and clean. The sitting arrangement is amazing. Everyone gets a private area to study without any disturbance.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Computer Science - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Some good things about college.

review_content.Placements: Till date, there are no placements provided in our college. If they provide placements in the future, I will consider it. Overall, I haven't had any experience with placements in our college. If they offer good opportunities, I will surely accept them.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is no Wi-Fi, and the condition of the labs is not very good. There is no A.C. in the labs, and the fans in the library are not working properly. There are not proper chairs in the library, and the classrooms are full of dust with no proper ventilation system. The washrooms are very unhygienic, and there are no proper sitting arrangements for students during free lectures.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: It is a good college for the computer science field.

review_content.Placements: Students need to score more than 75% to be able to get a seat in BCA. There's always a cutoff. The lowest salary package is Rs. 15,000 per month and the highest salary package is Rs. 5 LPA. Infosys, Wipro, and many more companies provide students with job offers. The top roles that were offered for our course are in web design, game development, app and software development, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: We have facilities like labs and air-conditioned rooms that are provided for this course. There's a sports meet once a year, and it allows all the students from any stream to participate in it, and prizes are also distributed. The canteen is good enough for eating, but it is not excellent.

review_summary.college_name: Saroop Rani Government College For Women Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Medical Science - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: No placement, affordable.

content.Placements: No placement is provided by the college. 30% of students get jobs by themselves. There are no big companies. No internship is provided by the college. This college is not for placement. It is only for getting a degree. In Science, we only get knowledge of Science theoretically.
content.Infrastructure: It was average. There was Wi-Fi at the start only. Laboratories were good. Classrooms were good. The library was good. The hostel was good. The canteen was not hygienic at all. Medical facilities were there. Sports and games were available in college. NCC was present. Overall, it was good.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: I am very disappointed because of placements but teachers are good and provide scholarships.

content.Placements: Only merit students get admission to this college. No placements are provided at this college. Only Flipkart enter our college to hire students whose package is only 1.20 LPA. Also, internships are not provided at this college. If we want to get internships then we can apply off-campus. There is no role in the course, they just given courses to collect money.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is just looking like a construction site. In summer, fans are also not working. Infrastructure of our college is also very old time. Food is much average. Sports are good in our college. There are many games in which we can participate.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Computer Science - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Some good things about college.

content.Placements: Till date, there are no placements provided in our college. If they provide placements in the future, I will consider it. Overall, I haven't had any experience with placements in our college. If they offer good opportunities, I will surely accept them.
content.Infrastructure: There is no Wi-Fi, and the condition of the labs is not very good. There is no A.C. in the labs, and the fans in the library are not working properly. There are not proper chairs in the library, and the classrooms are full of dust with no proper ventilation system. The washrooms are very unhygienic, and there are no proper sitting arrangements for students during free lectures.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college for the computer science field.

content.Placements: Students need to score more than 75% to be able to get a seat in BCA. There's always a cutoff. The lowest salary package is Rs. 15,000 per month and the highest salary package is Rs. 5 LPA. Infosys, Wipro, and many more companies provide students with job offers. The top roles that were offered for our course are in web design, game development, app and software development, etc.
content.Infrastructure: We have facilities like labs and air-conditioned rooms that are provided for this course. There's a sports meet once a year, and it allows all the students from any stream to participate in it, and prizes are also distributed. The canteen is good enough for eating, but it is not excellent.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Placements needs to be improved otherwise facilities available here are excellent.

content.Placements: The placement are not so good but approximately 60-70% students placed in this course and in a well known companies like icici bank, flipkart, syska etc. Almost 50% students get internship and the top role offered here is Accountant, Finance manager etc. Overall placements are satisfactory here.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure are good like we have two floored library, a big playground, a clean and organized lab, a classroom with basic facilities, a wi-fi campus, a good facility of transportation are also available here. The quality of things provided in hostel are fine but they needs to improve the room quality otherwise everything is fine.

faqs.answer: The qualifying cutoff marks for M.Tech. at the Indian Institute of Technology (IIT) Jodhpur are as follows:General/OBC: A minimum of 60% marks in aggregate or a CGPA of 6.0 on a 10-point scale.SC/ST/PwD: A minimum of 55% marks in aggregate or a CGPA of 5.5 on a 10-point scale.Tech Admission Process, Selection Criteria, Cutoffs. The expected IIT Jodhpur GATE cutoff 2024 for GN is 605 - 610, OBC-NCL is 600 - 605, SC is 449 - 453 and ST is 395 - 400.
faqs.question: Q: What are the Qualifying cutoff marks for M.Tech. at Jodhpur Institute of Engineering and Technology?

faqs.answer: Admissions to all courses offered by Jodhpur Institute of Engineering and Technology for the year 2024 are based on merit and entrance exams. The complete admission process is described below:Step 1 - Application Process:Candidates are required to register online and fill out the application form by visiting the official website of Jodhpur Institute of Engineering and Technology.Step 2 - Selection rounds:Candidates must obtain a valid score in one of the entrance tests such as JEE Main, REAP, GATE, MAT, XAT, CAT, ATMA, or NCHMCT JEE. Depending on the chosen course, candidates have to attend the counseling process.Step 3 - Admission confirmation:Once the selection process is completed, shortlisted candidates will be called for document verification. Admission will be granted based on academic performance, scores in the entrance tests, and performance in the selection process.
faqs.question: Q: What is the admission process of JIET?

faqs.answer: Indeed, direct admission possibilities may be available at the Jodhpur Institute of Engineering and Technology (JIET), usually under specific circumstances. For applicants who have not been accepted through the conventional entrance exam process, such as JEE Main or other state-level entrance exams, direct admission is typically an option.Among the requirements for direct admission are:Candidates who achieve a specific percentage in their qualifying exams (such as Class 12 for B.Tech) may be eligible for merit-based admissions.Management Quota: A portion of the seats may be set aside for admissions under the management quota, which frequently permits direct access according to the institute's qualifying requirements.Additional Requirements: Some diploma holders might also qualify for lateral admission to engineering schools.

answer.text: Jodhpur Institute of Engineering and Technology is overall a Tier 2 institution. The institution offers engineering programs and shares the status of a university with Bikaner Technical University, Rajasthan. While JIET is by no means equivalent to the status of class 1, like IITs or top NITs, JIET has developed a reputable academic curriculum as well as an emphasis on practical training with engagement from the industry. This will allow the college to attract local students for which it can offer placement opportunities in different sectors, though its actual clients are probably going to come from local or less competitive job markets as compared to Tier 1 colleges.

individual_reviews.title: Balanced campus with good placements and supportive faculty.

content.Placements: Placements at JIET for B.Teach CSE are generally good. Many companies visit the campus for campus recruitment, including TCS, Wipro, Infosys, Capgemini, and some product-based companies. Average packages are around 4-5 LPA, with some students getting higher, 8-12 LPA, in good companies.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is well developed. Labs and classrooms are well-equipped computer labs with updated systems and internet. Top recruiters are Microsoft, Google, Amazon, Deloitte, TCS, Infosys, Accenture, Wipro, and Capgemini. 70 to 75% students also got AI startups internships, with Amazon, Microsoft, Deloitte, Infosys, TCS, and startups in Healthcare, FinTech, EdTech. Top Roles offered are ML Engineer, Data Scientist, AI Engineer, SDE, Data Analyst, NLP Engineer, CV Engineer, and AI Research Intern.

Except for EAMCET, candidates can look into other exams such as GATE. This, again, has further relevance to the postgraduate level. The entrance exams have come to play a crucial role in granting admission as they determine merit and eligibility through one's performance.

hostel_campus.college_name: Jodhpur Institute of Engineering and Technology

reviews.review_heading: Balanced campus with good placements and supportive faculty.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is well developed. Labs and classrooms are well-equipped computer labs with updated systems and internet. The library has a good collection of technical books. The campus is Wi-Fi enabled, a green campus, and sports facilities are available. We have decent hostel facilities with furnished rooms.

reviews.review_heading: Supportive faculty, good placements, and active campus life.
reviews.review_text: The AI & ML department has Wi-Fi-enabled, smart classrooms, dedicated AI/ML labs with high performance systems, and a well stocked library with online resources, IEEE, Springer, NPTEL, etc. Hostels are clean and Wi-Fi enabled, with decent living space. The mess provides hygienic and nutritious food, while the canteen offers snacks and fast food. The campus has a health center with medical staff and tie ups with a nearby hospital. Sports facilities include grounds, courts, a gym, and indoor game...

reviews.review_heading: This college is good and located in Jodhpur.
reviews.review_text: My department has a library, Wi-Fi connections, clean washrooms, and good labs, but not all lecture theaters have air conditioning. The hostels are good, and the food quality is average. The food quality in the canteen is very good. Medical facilities are good because my college also has a hospital, and it's good for both games and sports students.

reviews.review_heading: Solid infrastructure and campus life, decent placements, but civil needs more industry exposure.
reviews.review_text: Our college has 24X7 high-speed Wi-Fi, labs, and specialized labs. We have one main big central library along with 8 departmental libraries. Boys and girls have separate hostels. Rooms include almirahs, fans, and lights. You can get AC facilities also along with balcony. We have proper security. It also offers cafeteria and has pure veg mess. Gym and sports are also available.

reviews.review_heading: JIET: Life as an engineer.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are good both in the department and hostel. Wi-Fi is available 24 hours and labs are equipped with the latest tech. Classrooms and the library are comfortable and have a quiet environment to study in. The food in the mess is acceptable to eat but not extraordinarily the best. JIET has its own hospital there. Medical facilities are the best for students as well as their parents. It provides both indoor as well as outdoor games.

reviews.review_heading: I suggest everyone not to take admission in this college.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for our course are below average because classrooms are not properly maintained, and in some classrooms, honeybees often attack through the windows. There are no ACs in the classrooms, making it very difficult to stay in class during summer. Talking about hostels, they are also not well maintained and not properly cleaned.

reviews.review_heading: If any students are not selected in IIT or NIT these students are not gone.
reviews.review_text: In college, all classroom and lab are well and good maintain. Faculty members are good. Hostel facilities are also good and provide good quality food in mess. Overall, hostel facilities are good and rooms are good. AC facilities are also available at this college.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure but sometimes lack in management of activities satisfied with college.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure are good. In my point of view they only lack sports facilities. There is no good ground to play football or cricket. Canteen food is good but mess food can sometimes become horrible. The Wi-Fi speed and library are also average.

reviews.review_heading: JIET college a review by student.
reviews.review_text: College has a huge campus divided into 2 parts, South and North campus where different departments are situated and huge grounds and separate canteen for each campus. I don't have much knowledge about hostels because I'm a day scholar and we are back home after college is over.

reviews.review_heading: It's worth this value, so go for it.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure of the college are good. The campus is not that big, but Wi-Fi is available at every corner of the college. Smart classrooms and labs are there, and a central library is available, which includes almost all books. Faculty in my college are friendly and helpful in nature.

reviews.review_heading: I like my college very much, the faculty here is also very good.
reviews.review_text: My college hostel is very best and clean. Our college sports ground is very large, and all sports activities are available. The medical faculty is also very good, available even at night. The food in the canteen is also very good. The library is very clean and quiet.

reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied with college faculty members but dissatisfied with placement and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Our college labs, classrooms, and library are good, but Wi-Fi quality and network are very bad.  Canteen food is very good and hygienic, but our mess food is not that good. Sometimes food is good but not best, and sometimes the food is hard to swallow.

reviews.review_heading: JIET Jodhpur and its insights.
reviews.review_text: KBT College of Engineering has an open library with a good internet connection. which connections can only be accessed by a user ID provided to each student. College also has a very nice cafeteria. Our college organises number of sports events, which help in developing personal health.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Jodhpur Institute of Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of our hostel is very good. Rooms are clean and warden is very helpful and kind to everyone. We have a fabulous mess and food is excellent. There are four canteens and students are treated like their own children.

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty, placement, infrastructure, scholarships for some students, and good hostel facilities.
reviews.review_text: Hostel is in good condition and clean. Hostel facilities are also good compared to its facilities. Wi-Fi is installed in all hostels, and mess food is decent. Volleyball, football, and cricket are played in the hostel. Friends are good. Warden sir is also nice.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about Jodhpur Institute of Engineering and Technology, JIET Group of Institutions

likes.text: Topmost companies like Infosys, Capgemini, Tata Consultancy Services, Airbus, IBM, IMS, Moolya Software Testing, Alok Industries Limited and many more companies visited the campus for placements.
The college helps the students to acquire access to ample opportunities of getting placed in the best companies in the current market scenario.

college_info.intro:
Dr. G.Y. Pathrikar College of Computer Science and IT courses are offered to students at UG and PG levels. The college is mainly concerned with the field of Computer Technology and IT. Some of the most popular programmes offered at Dr. GY Pathrikar College of Computer Science and IT include BSc (Hons), BCA (Hons), and MSc. The college offers these programmes in various fields such as Computer Science, Information Technology, Animation, Hardware Networking, and Data Science along with certificate courses. Further, the college offers BSc (Hons) and BCA(Hons) to students for a duration of 4 years. Candidates can check the Dr. G.Y. Pathrikar College of Computer Science and IT popular programmes in the table given below:

reviews_list.batch_info: M.Sc. in Data Science - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: College placements are not satisfactory.

review_content.Placements: In our senior batch, 70 to 80% of students were placed. The highest package was 12 LPA, and the average package was 6 LPA. More than 20 companies participated in the hiring process, with HCL, Tech Mahindra, Eaton, and Birlasoft among the top companies. Internships are given, but they are project task-based unpaid internships from Oasis Infobyte. Roles we got after the course are Data Analyst and Data Scientist.
review_content.Infrastructure: College campus is big, different colleges in one campus. Our college building was recently built, with Wi-Fi available in the library and hostel. Classrooms are big, and they have projectors. Hostel facilities are good, but it feels more, mess food is good, but I suggest the canteen's food is better. We have a big sports ground in which different sections for cricket, football, basketball are provided separately.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.Sc. in Information Technology - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Good journey in GY Pathrikar college of CS IT.

review_content.Placements: From the 2023 recession, getting a job in IT became more challenging, but colleges tried their hardest to bring in companies for placements. 50% of the class got jobs, but more students ended up in intern roles. I secured a job at Cravita Technologies as an AWS intern with an average package of 4 LPA. Five students were placed in MNCs, while the rest were placed at startups.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college is newly built, and our campus is very big. Each department has its own lab with all computers in working condition. Wi-Fi is not available. The classrooms are good, but projectors are present in specific classrooms only. I do not like the hostel; it has small rooms, and the mess food is bad. Instead, I decided to live in a PG.

review_summary.college_name: Dr GY Pathrikar College of Computer Science and IT Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Integrated (B.Sc. - M.Sc. Data Science) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: My journey in Dr. G. Y. Pathrikar college.

content.Placements: 70% of students got placed in senior batch as data analyst, data engineers, etc. The highest package is 7 LPA and the average package is 4 to 5 LPA. The minimum package is 3.4 LPA. There are 100% internships with good companies. The top companies that visited the campus were Wipro, TCS, Infosys, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure provided by college is good; it has Wi-Fi throughout the campus. The classroom is also good. Almost every classroom has projectors. The library is not good for focused study because it only has plain tables and chairs, so that is one disadvantage. A drinking water filter is available but not working. A gym is also available for free at the university.

individual_reviews.course: BCA (Hons.) in Digital Marketing - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Having good infrastructure does not guarantee placement.

content.Placements: We are the first batch for a digital marketing course. The college claims a 100% placement guarantee, but I don't believe they provide it. There are very few students who get placements from the college. The highest package a student got from MGM is 8 LPA, with an average of 3 to 4 LPA, and the lowest being 2 LPA. Top recruitment companies include TCS, HDFC, Microsoft, and sometimes Google. Being the first batch, we are unsure about the percentage of students hired from our course, but I believe there is demand for digital marketers, so getting placements from the college should be feasible. Top roles include video editing, social media manager, performance marketer, SEO expert, etc.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Data Science - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: College placements are not satisfactory.

content.Placements: In our senior batch, 70 to 80% of students were placed. The highest package was 12 LPA, and the average package was 6 LPA. More than 20 companies participated in the hiring process, with HCL, Tech Mahindra, Eaton, and Birlasoft among the top companies. Internships are given, but they are project task-based unpaid internships from Oasis Infobyte. Roles we got after the course are Data Analyst and Data Scientist.
content.Infrastructure: College campus is big, different colleges in one campus. Our college building was recently built, with Wi-Fi available in the library and hostel. Classrooms are big, and they have projectors. Hostel facilities are good, but it feels more, mess food is good, but I suggest the canteen's food is better. We have a big sports ground in which different sections for cricket, football, basketball are provided separately.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Information Technology - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Good journey in GY Pathrikar college of CS IT.

content.Placements: From the 2023 recession, getting a job in IT became more challenging, but colleges tried their hardest to bring in companies for placements. 50% of the class got jobs, but more students ended up in intern roles. I secured a job at Cravita Technologies as an AWS intern with an average package of 4 LPA. Five students were placed in MNCs, while the rest were placed at startups.
content.Infrastructure: The college is newly built, and our campus is very big. Each department has its own lab with all computers in working condition. Wi-Fi is not available. The classrooms are good, but projectors are present in specific classrooms only. I do not like the hostel; it has small rooms, and the mess food is bad. Instead, I decided to live in a PG.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Information Technology - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Best IT College in Marathwada region.

content.Placements: Mass recruiters like TCS, Infosys, Wipro, Capgemini, and Cognizant hire us at 3–4 LPA. The lowest salary is offered by SAS Technology at 15,000 per month. In the class, 50% of students get jobs. No internships are given by the college; we have to hunt for them ourselves. In the 2023 batch, placements are the worst in the last five years.
content.Infrastructure: The college is newly built and well-maintained. Free Wi-Fi is available everywhere, but it has some search restrictions. There are more than 60 computers in the computer lab. Hostels are available on campus with 24*7 security and CCTV. The mess food is moderate in taste and quality. In sports events, cricket, football, kabaddi, volleyball, and basketball matches take place.

reviews.review_heading: My journey in Dr. G. Y. Pathrikar college.
reviews.review_text:
The infrastructure provided by college is good; it has Wi-Fi throughout the campus. The classroom is also good. Almost every classroom has projectors. The library is not good for focused study because it only has plain tables and chairs, so that is one disadvantage.
A drinking water filter is available but not working. A gym is also available for free at the university.

reviews.review_heading: Having good infrastructure does not guarantee placement.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is good; we have a lift in our building, spacious libraries for studying, and Wi-Fi for students. Classrooms and labs are dedicated, with separate computer labs. I have no information about the hostel, but I have tried the food from the mess and canteen once, and although I didn't like it much, it's better than other mess food, I guess.

reviews.review_heading: College placements are not satisfactory.
reviews.review_text: College campus is big, different colleges in one campus. Our college building was recently built, with Wi-Fi available in the library and hostel. Classrooms are big, and they have projectors. Hostel facilities are good, but it feels more, mess food is good, but I suggest the canteen's food is better. We have a big sports ground in which different sections for cricket, football, basketball are provided separately.

reviews.review_heading: Good journey in GY Pathrikar college of CS IT.
reviews.review_text: The college is newly built, and our campus is very big. Each department has its own lab with all computers in working condition. Wi-Fi is not available. The classrooms are good, but projectors are present in specific classrooms only. I do not like the hostel; it has small rooms, and the mess food is bad. Instead, I decided to live in a PG.

reviews.review_heading: Best IT College in Marathwada region.
reviews.review_text: The college is newly built and well-maintained. Free Wi-Fi is available everywhere, but it has some search restrictions. There are more than 60 computers in the computer lab. Hostels are available on campus with 24*7 security and CCTV. The mess food is moderate in taste and quality. In sports events, cricket, football, kabaddi, volleyball, and basketball matches take place.

reviews.review_heading: I am not satisfied with this college because of its placements in 2018.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides us with all facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, etc. The food served in the mess, hostel, and canteen is good. 0ur college provides us with sports, games, and medical facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied and enjoyable every moment.
reviews.review_text:
* The facility and the infrastructure of the course and department is excellent. * The quality of the facility in hostel, food good. * mess and canteen are excellent 
* medical facilities re available for the students as well as for hostelers
* Strict rules and regulation.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: There are labs, libraries, and classrooms to study for different departments. There is Wi-Fi for students to study online. There are all facilities in hostel, good quality of food in canteen, have sports curriculum for students to participate in different activities.

reviews.review_heading: You can experience college life as per your desire .
reviews.review_text:
Our college building and campus area is one of the biggest  in our city and the college has their own University.
The hostels of our college are safe and clean and the food of our mess and canteen was good and hygienic. 
Medical faculty of our college is also good 
Sports and games activities are well organized in the college.

reviews.review_heading: Campus is good and teaching is also good but not that much of value for money.
reviews.review_text:
The wi-fi is only for staff and not for student and labs are fine but not computer they have. They have some older computer. Classrooms and library are very net and clean. I am not in hostel but there is canteen in college serves decent food and not that much of interest in sports
.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of faculty and their teaching skills.
reviews.review_text:
Our institution has a pleasant environment. For practicals, there is a magnificent computer lab available. There are large classrooms and a library available.
There are many books available for study in the library. Hostel quality is good for outstation students. The food in the canteen is of high quality. Sports ground is available.

reviews.review_heading: You can experience the best college life here.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, computer labs, and system setups are available here. Classrooms are clean and huge. The library has a lot of books to choose from. The hostels of the college are really clean and have facilities like a water cooler, a water heater, clean beds, fans, toilets, etc.

reviews.review_heading: I would recommend this college for students who want good placements.
reviews.review_text: The college has a big 4-storyed building where it has all the classrooms and labs. Laboratories are provided with high-tech computers and technology, which helps in academic performance. The library is good and has various books which you can borrow on a card.

reviews.review_heading: The placement rate is increasing year by year.
reviews.review_text: Our campus is huge, and all facilities are provided in our college. Our college has a very clean and neat area. Our college properly uses all the resources and has an eco-friendly environment which can attract every student. For students, various sports activities are conducted.

reviews.review_heading: It is good for getting a degree and also for some enjoyment, but placements are not offered.
reviews.review_text: Facilities were good, but the fees and other costs were higher than expected. You could get admission only if you wanted a degree, nothing more than that. Sports and games were available, and some tournaments were held. You could play volleyball and cricket every day.

highlights.summary:
The TANCET 2026 application form is live until Apr 10, 2026, for Park's College admission to the MBA course. Also, the TANCET exam 2026 is scheduled for May 9, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

college_info.intro: The flagship programmes offered at PARK’s College are BSc and BCom. The college offers a wide range of programmes at the UG and PG levels. These programmes are offered to students across several specialisations such as English Literature, Performing Arts, Information Technology, etc. Further, the college is affiliated with Bharathiar University and offers programmes in full-time mode. These programmes strive to enhance the learning experience of students in order to prepare them for the industry. Candidates can check the popular programmes offered at PARK’s College Tamil Nadu in the table provided below:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: PARK’s College courses are offered to students in full-time mode. The college offers a diverse range of courses to students at the UG and PG levels. The college offers Degree courses with a focus on streams such as Accounting and Commerce, Business and Management Studies, Design, Humanities and Social Sciences, IT and Software, and Science. Some of the most popular courses offered at Park College are BCom, BSc, BBA, MBA, and MCom. These courses are offered to students across several specialisations such as English Literature, CA, Mathematics, International Business, Hotel Administration, etc. In addition to this, PARK College Tamil Nadu also offers MPhil pogramme to students across several specialisations such as MPhil Computer Science, MPhil Tamil MPhil English, MPhil Commerce, and many more. This course is offered to students in both full-time and part-time mode. The following table showcases a list of along with their eligibility criteria and total tuition fee:

faqs.answer: A:    Park's College accepts th TANCET exam for admission to the MBA course. Candidates must appear for this exam and achieve a valid aggregate in the same to take admission in the MBA course at Park's College. Also, they must pass graduation with a minimum of 50% aggregate (45% for reserved category) to be eligible for admission in the course.
faqs.question: Which entrance exam is accepted by Park's College?

reviews_list.review_title: Budget-friendly Autonomous College.

review_content.Placements: In my batch, 55% of the students were placed in my course, with a minimum of 1.5 LPA and a maximum of 5 LPA. I got selected as a Wipro trainee with an M. Tech degree and job training. In my college, many IT and IT-related companies visited for interviews, including startup companies around Coimbatore.
review_content.Infrastructure: In my Park College, the infrastructure and facilities are very nice and clean. This includes computer labs, classrooms, and a library with free Wi-Fi access without any restrictions. However, there is no mess, so you need to go outside for meals. The canteen also needs improvements and should add more food items, not only snacks.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: It is a good college for graduation.

review_content.Placements: The salary packages offered at our college were not good. There were 3 tier companies that offered placements in our college with a basic salary of Rs.10,000 per month and for PG courses, it was more worst.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college was good but the classrooms were not fully equipped. MBA tables were good. UG classrooms were not good and had rusted tables. Toilets were not good. Water and canteen facilities were not good.
review_content.Faculty: Faculty members in our college were good but many students didn't attend classes. The teaching of some teachers was not understandable.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Mathematics - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: I am dissatisfied with placements provided in 2022.

review_content.Placements: Our college does not provide placements from branded companies with high salary packages. Our course students are not placed on campus.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has a library but not much infrastructure is available. Classrooms are normal with blackboards and provide average coaching. It is an ordinary college with an ordinary curriculum.
review_content.Faculty: Even though it is an ordinary college, Mathematics professors are very helpful. They teach us quality mathematics. Besides mathematics, BCA is a good course to choose from.

admission_overview.title: Park's College Admission Overview 2025
admission_overview.description: Park's College admissions 2025 are both entrance and merit-based. The college offers a variety of courses ranging from UG and PG levels, such as BBA, BA, BCA, BCom, BSc, MBA, MCom, MSc, etc. The institute also offers PhD course at the doctoral level. Park's College accepts scores of certain entrance exams, such as TANCET. For some courses, admissions are granted based on Class 12 or graduation marks. Interested candidates can apply online or offline as per their preference.

eligibility_selection.title: Park's College Eligibility and Selection 2025
eligibility_selection.description: To gain admission at Park's College, students need to first clear the eligibility and selection criteria set for the chosen course. Please note that each course will have different criteria accordingly. Majority of the courses are based on merit, although some require candidates to have appear for an entrance exam. Students can refer to the table below to know about some of the popular Park's College courses with their eligibility and selection criteria:

courses_table.eligibility: Pass Class 12 with a minimum of 50% aggregate with Commerce as a compulsory subject from a recognised board
Pass Class 12 with a minimum of 50% aggregate with Commerce as a compulsory subject from a recognised board
Pass Class 12 with a minimum of 50% aggregate with the relevant subject from a recognised board
Pass graduation with a minimum of 50% aggregate (45% for reserved category)
Pass BSc with a minimum of 50% aggregate (45% for reserved category)
Pass graduation in relevant subject with a minimum of 50% aggregate (45% for reserved category)

faqs.answer: Yes, a candidate is eligible for admission in Park's College with 60% in Class 12. The minimum required aggregate for admission in the UG courses is 50% (45% for reserved category). Candidates must submit the marksheet and certificate for the same to apply for admission in Park's College.
faqs.question: Am I eligible for admission in Park's College with 60% in Class 12?

faqs.answer: The eligibility criteria for admission in BSc course at Park's College requires the candidates to pass Class 12 with a minimum of 50% aggregate with maths as a compulsory subject from a recognised board. Admissions to this course are merit-based and merit of Class 12 is accepted for the same.
faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for admission in BSc course at Park's College?

paragraphs: The Admission process of Park's Collegeis mainly held online. Students have complete an online application form by going to official website. Also, they might need to appear for an entrance exam, if applicable for their preferred course. Refer to the table below to know thePark's College admission process:-
1.Park's College Registration Process 2025

Candidates are required to register with the institute to apply for admission. This is the first step in the admission process. Application forms can be filled out online on the official website of the college. Paying the application fee is necessary to submit the form.
2. Park's College Selection Criteria 2025

After successfully registering with the institute, the candidates are required to appear for an entrance exam, TANCET, if they are seeking admission in the MBA course. While for admission to all the other courses, merit of Class 12 or graduation is required and accepted.
3. Admission call and confirmation of seat
Once the candidates are selected, they must pay the tuition fee or a certain amount.

Park's Collegefeeshas several components, like tuition fees, security fees, and other charges. The course fee varies with different courses and course levels. Candidates who qualify for the selection process must pay the tuition fees to confirm their seat. Below arePark's College feesfor popular courses:-

reviews.review_heading: Budget-friendly Autonomous College.
reviews.review_text: In my Park College, the infrastructure and facilities are very nice and clean. This includes computer labs, classrooms, and a library with free Wi-Fi access without any restrictions. However, there is no mess, so you need to go outside for meals. The canteen also needs improvements and should add more food items, not only snacks.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for graduation.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college was good but the classrooms were not fully equipped. MBA tables were good. UG classrooms were not good and had rusted tables. Toilets were not good. Water and canteen facilities were not good.

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied with placements provided in 2022.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a library but not much infrastructure is available. Classrooms are normal with blackboards and provide average coaching. It is an ordinary college with an ordinary curriculum.

review_summary.college_name: Noble University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Noble University is a success for career.

content.Placements: I am a B.Com student and my job placement is based on my percentage, skills and experience. My field is very important and the average salary is 20,000 for freshers. You can also achieve experience, which will increase your salary along with your consistency for the job.
content.Infrastructure: Noble University has a very large infrastructure in Junagadh. The infrastructure facilities like canteen, transportation, hospital and hostels are absolutely good. They provide the best quality food in the canteen and other facilities like the sports ground are also available.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Noble University, Junagadh review, 2017-2020.

content.Placements: I was studying for a Diploma in Computer Engineering, as I mentioned earlier. In our college, students were around 60-70 in the first year. As the year passed, the number reduced due to exams. Students leave the college due to difficulty in the course and many other reasons. By the final year, only about 45 students remained, which is half of the first-year strength. The lowest package offered was around 1.2 LPA by less popular companies. Around 18-20 students received job offers from companies. the roles offered by our course were not very good until now.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Very good infrastructure and faculty members are supportive.

content.Placements: The placement system in this department of the college is fair and supportive. Not all, but 80 percent of students are placed after their course. The top recruiting companies are Just Dial, IndiaMART, Wipro, Girnar Industries, etc. There are no internships provided after any course, and the package which actual students received is 1.5 to 2.5 average.
content.Infrastructure: The campus provides hostel facilities for girls as well as boys. And the hostel facilitates with 2-bed and 4-bed, AC and non-AC. It provides the option to live in a hostel with these facilities. The hostel mess is good compared to others in that area, and the hostel also provides the sports ground and sports facility to their students.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Review about noble campus.

content.Placements: The placement rate is almost 70 to 80 percent, with placements in top-rated companies. In the past, the university has given placements to 3000+ students, and it has large scope in fields like commerce, science, and marketing. All courses are two or three years long.
content.Infrastructure: The university's infrastructure is so giant that all kinds of services can be availed in one place. Additionally, there is a branch of Syndicate Bank on campus, so there are no worries about banking for hostel students. The library has enough space to accommodate 150 students at a time.

individual_reviews.course: B.Com with Chartered Accountancy - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: RP's review on Noble University.

content.Placements: The placements in my course are pretty high; about 85 to 90 percent of students get placed. The minimum package offered was 6 lakh per annum, and the highest package was about 24 or 30 lakh per annum last year to our seniors. Top companies like TCS, Reliance, and some other local companies also came for placements, with roles like accounts manager and sales manager being the top offers.
content.Infrastructure: The classes, library, grounds for sports, and labs for science students are great and among the best in the city. The classrooms are large and filled with sunlight, and the library has two floors with every book that you can use in your college life. There are grounds and equipment for every sport. I didn't spend much time in the hostel, so I can't tell much about that; all I know is that there are hostels for girls and boys on campus.

admission_overview.college_name: Noble University Courses Admission 2025: Fees, Eligibility, Selection Criteria & Dates

paragraphs: Noble University admission is merit based for programmes offered at UG, PG, Certificate, and After 10th levels. Amid all these courses, some of the popularNoble University coursesoffered at the UG level include B.E. / B.Tech, B.Arch, and B.A.M.S. and at the PG level, the institution provides, M.E./M.Tech, M.Pharma, and MBA/PGDM, etc. Students interested in Noble University admission 2025 must check the fees and other details below:

faqs.question: How do I get admission in B.Tech at Noble University?
faqs.answer: Noble University offers entrance-based admission to BTech. To be eligible for admission to BTech candidates need to apply and appear for JEE Main. Further, candidates must fill out the basic eligibility i.e., pass Class 10 and Class 12 with 45% aggregate from a recognised board.

faqs.answer: Noble University admission 2023 is open for BTech.Admission to the course is based on merit in JEE Main. Hence, only the aspirants with a valid JEE Main score can apply. To be eligible for admission candidates are required to apply and appear for the same. Additionally, candidates are required to go through theACPC normsbefore applying for admission.

faqs.question: What are the courses offered at Noble University?
faqs.answer: The university offers over 80 courses at UG, PG, Diploma and PhD levels. The courses include BSc, MSc, BCom, BA, BPharma, BTech and others. To be eligible for admission to any courses candidates are required to fill out the basic eligibility criteria i.e., completing Class 10 and Class 12 for UG courses. Graduation is necessary to apply for PG courses. Additionally, candidates are required to appear in the entrance exam accepted by the university for some courses including BTech, BPharma, BAMS and others.

faqs.question: Can I apply for Noble University admission?
faqs.answer: Noble University admissions are open for all courses. The college offers merit and entrance-based admission to all UG, PG, Diploma and doctoral courses. Candidates looking for admission to NobleUniversity must fill out the online application form by visiting the university campus.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission at Noble University?
faqs.answer: Noble University offers entrance-based admission to BTech, BPharma, BAMS, and other courses. Candidates seeking admission to any of these courses must appear for various entrance exams including JEE Main, NEET, and others. Further, for BSc, BCom, MSc, and other courses, the university offers merit-based admission. To be eligible for these courses, candidates must have fulfilled the eligibility criteria set by the university.

More than 500 companies participated in Noble University placements 2024 including renowned names such as Axis Bank, Zydus, Astral Adhesives , and many others.

gallery_page.college_name: Noble University Photos & Videos

reviews.review_heading: Noble University is a success for career.
reviews.review_text: Noble University has a very large infrastructure in Junagadh. The infrastructure facilities like canteen, transportation, hospital and hostels are absolutely good. They provide the best quality food in the canteen and other facilities like the sports ground are also available.

reviews.review_heading: Noble University, Junagadh review, 2017-2020.
reviews.review_text: Facilities like Wi-Fi, lab, cafe, canteen, tea post, library, ground, and auditorium are available. The quality of canteen and cafeteria are best,  with a rating of 9/10 for food at mess and hostel. Medical facilities are rated 4 stars out of 5. Sports and games are played every year at college. Sports instruments are already available like football, cricket kit, carrom, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Very good infrastructure and faculty members are supportive.
reviews.review_text: The campus provides hostel facilities for girls as well as boys. And the hostel facilitates with 2-bed and 4-bed, AC and non-AC. It provides the option to live in a hostel with these facilities. The hostel mess is good compared to others in that area, and the hostel also provides the sports ground and sports facility to their students.

reviews.review_heading: Review about noble campus.
reviews.review_text: The university's infrastructure is so giant that all kinds of services can be availed in one place. Additionally, there is a branch of Syndicate Bank on campus, so there are no worries about banking for hostel students. The library has enough space to accommodate 150 students at a time.

reviews.review_heading: RP's review on Noble University.
reviews.review_text: The classes, library, grounds for sports, and labs for science students are great and among the best in the city. The classrooms are large and filled with sunlight, and the library has two floors with every book that you can use in your college life. There are grounds and equipment for every sport. I didn't spend much time in the hostel, so I can't tell much about that; all I know is that there are hostels for girls and boys on campus.

reviews.review_heading: Good atmosphere for students, good placement in 2017.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are average here; the labs and library contain air conditioning and a Wi-Fi system. I didn't stay in the hostel, but according to my friend, the hostel facility is good; the college provides good medical facilities for all students and staff; and the college canteen is average.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is very good for students.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is the best. Our college is Wi-Fi enabled. A huge library is available in our college. Our college provides a decent study room. Classrooms are equipped with projectors. The hostel facilities are good. The food served in the mess and canteen is the best.

reviews.review_heading: The is the best college for everything like studies, sports, cultural events, etc.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the hostel is so good that you can't expect like this in any college it is like your home. The food of the hostel is also like your own home. It never gives you chance to complain about food of the hotel. There are also so many sports activities you can do in hostel.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college in everything.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is huge and good. It has 2 to 3 canteens that serve good food and have a big playground. There is a separate hostel for boys and girls. Mess serves tasty food and maintains good hygiene. Bus facilities are provided from various routes at low cost.

reviews.review_heading: The college is good for internships, placements, and students.
reviews.review_text: The canteen facilities are superb. The library is huge, so students can study peacefully.

reviews.review_heading: Overall you can get a good experience here but don't expect much.
reviews.review_text: There is an ayurvedic hospital nearby and an ambulance is also available. The hostel is average and the food served is below average and of poor quality. Students and staff are good. Cleanliness and hygiene are poor around the room. Even the laundry is very poor.

reviews.review_heading: It is a below-average college.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facilities are good for both boys and girls. Facilities like Wi-Fi, library and classroom are just good. Recently, they build an indoor and outdoor sports complex so you can play 2 hours in a week as per the official time slot. The food served to the students is bad.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college in Gujarat.
reviews.review_text: Free Wi-Fi is available in the college at any time. Labs and classrooms are very clean and beautiful, and the classrooms are lighting and clean. Canteen and medical facilities are the best in the college. All facilities like theatre, PPT, etc., are available here.

reviews.review_heading: College is good for just education other activities like sports,cultural event,and placement is poor
reviews.review_text: Wi-fi is good and its speed is high. In Computer lab completely working computer but air conditioner is not properly worked. Classroom is good clean and big green board and fans facilities is good. Library is excellent environment but books are in limited numbers And all books are for old syllabus don't updated by college for new course. Hostels rooms are good. Food quality is medium. Medical facilities are good because of medical college in campus.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Noble Group of Institutions, Junagadh.
reviews.review_text: Noble Group of Institution has a great engineering environment, and the best part of our college is our faculty. Students are like a family. Every year, our college organises a group and many events for students.

reviews_list.review_title: The best days of the life to cherish.

review_content.Placements: The placement rate was 85% as far as I know, students from my batch all were placed other than the irregular ones in the batch. We were given a special training, and now most of us are working for good companies. Those days were the best of my life with all the good things. I thank my teachers for supporting me on this level. I was placed even before my course was over, so I did not have wastage of time after completing my course.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, restroom, etc. The lab and classrooms were of a good system, but a little lack of space was the problem we faced. We didn't have a canteen for our institute yet a coffee machine was installed. Now I find those days perfect with a lot of memories to cherish lifelong.

individual_reviews.course: Higher Diploma in 3D Animation - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: It has good infrastructure, good faculty members, and good facilities.

content.Placements: I was offered a salary package of Rs. 15,000 per month. Skills matter for placements, not the percentage. The top roles offered are 3D modelling and texturing. The top recruiting companies are MPC, Rockstar Gaming, Amazon, etc. About 70% of students get internships in graphic design, 2D animation, web development, video editing, and 3D modelling.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and classrooms are good. There is no Wi-Fi. There is no hostel. There are a total of eight labs with full equipment for the students. Classrooms are always neat and clean. They maintain hygiene. They interact with students and solve their issues.

individual_reviews.course: Higher Diploma in 3D and VFX - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: The prefect place for those who love to study visual media.

content.Placements: More than 100 students were hired in jobs before the course completion. The placements are provided in different parts of India. With more than 200 companies attending the campus drive, you will have a placement after the course completion for sure. I'm happy to be a part of it.
content.Infrastructure: All the classrooms are air-conditioned. The classrooms have a very good atmosphere for our free mind. There will be no restrictions for anything at all. There a lot of co-curricular activities conducted. All the classrooms have the latest hardware and software for the courses. Food in the canteen is okay for those who have low pocket money.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Information Technology - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied because of the faculty, good placements, and really good infrastructure.

content.Placements: Around 20% of the students from the college were placed. The highest annual package was quite competitive, but the lowest average was quite decent. Top recruiting companies include Accenture, Deloitte, and many more good IT companies. The major roles in this course include data, data analyst, programmer, developer, software engineer, and many more positions that a student can start their career in.
content.Infrastructure: Everything is so well-maintained. Classrooms are clean, they are big, and the faculty is good. The libraries are maintained very well. Teachers are good. The education that they provide is of a high level. The infrastructure is also good. The canteen food is okay, not that great. The medical facilities and games are available whenever we need to go out, like on our ground, we can go and play in the canteen. Food is also okay not that good. They can improve in this.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure and a supportive environment for all the students.

content.Placements: Placements are decent, with around 60-70% of students placed every year. The highest package is usually around 3-4 LPA, the lowest about 1.5-2 LPA, with an average package of 2.5 LPA. Nearly 50% of students get internships in accounting firms, finance companies, or bank office support roles.
content.Infrastructure: It’s amazing. I really like my college. It has all the facilities. The college has a medical room for emergencies, sports facilities for indoor and outdoor activities, and space for extracurricular activities. Overall, the infrastructure is student-oriented and supportive.

content.Placements: We had a lot of placements for B.M.M. like Sales, Advertisement, Journalism, etc. We were offered many internships as well during the college life for Graphic Designer, ad make and the lowest salary offered was 20k and the highest was 35k for freshers .

admission_process.title: S.M. Shetty College of Science, Commerce and Management Studies Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: S.M. Shetty College of Science, Commerce and Management Studies admission2025 is both merit and entrance-based. The college offers 15 programmes at the UG, PG and Certificate levels in various fields, including Business and Management Studies, IT and Software, Accounting and Commerce, Design, Mass Communication and Media, Humanities and Social Sciences and Science, etc. The mode of study for the offered courses is full time. The institute accepts exams, such as MAH CET, Maharashtra HSC, and Mumbai University Admission, for admission to some specificS.M. Shetty College of Science, Commerce and Management Studies courses. For certain programmes, the college considers the merit of the last qualifying exam of candidates, ensuring a comprehensive approach to admissions. Read more details around S.M. Shetty College of Science, Commerce and Management Studies admission in the following article.
S.M. Shetty College of Science, Commerce and Management StudiesDuration: The college offers UG courses for 3 years. For courses at PG level, the duration is 2 years.
