reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of the faculty, good placements, and really good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Everything is so well-maintained. Classrooms are clean, they are big, and the faculty is good. The libraries are maintained very well. Teachers are good. The education that they provide is of a high level. The infrastructure is also good. The canteen food is okay, not that great. The medical facilities and games are available whenever we need to go out, like on our ground, we can go and play in the canteen. Food is also okay not that good. They can improve in this.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and a supportive environment for all the students.
reviews.review_text: It’s amazing. I really like my college. It has all the facilities. The college has a medical room for emergencies, sports facilities for indoor and outdoor activities, and space for extracurricular activities. Overall, the infrastructure is student-oriented and supportive.

reviews.review_heading: Some Shetty is a great choice for every student.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure was awesome. If we talk about classrooms, library, labs, bathrooms, canteen, and ground, all were well maintained. The quality of food is also better in our canteen, but the space is not sufficient. According to me, it needs to be made more spacious in the future.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is amazing with air-conditioned classrooms and very good faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is amazing. An air-conditioner is installed in every classroom with a whiteboard and blackboard. Our college has an air-conditioned auditorium and an open area to practice every event. It provides facilities like a huge playground and canteen. Our canteen offers good food to students.

reviews.review_heading: The college where you can find everything you need.
reviews.review_text: The college has great labs and was always in development for computer labs new technologies which helped us a lot and we were never disturbed by it at all. Sports is something that the college supports a lot and has best training for every sports. Canteen food is good and has a great medical facilities .

reviews.review_heading: I am really satisfied with the college facilities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is just awesome. Our college is very clean and all facilities are available. We can visit the library at any time that is available for us; they provide all the books and notes that we want. Our canteen is also very big and clean and the foods are also very healthy. They make sure it is hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: All about S.M. Shetty College.
reviews.review_text:
The college has good and large library. Air-conditioned classrooms as well as good interiors are there.
The canteens are also quite hygienic and have a good sitting area. Sports competitions are also held once a year to indulge students in activities and side studies and rejuvenate themselves.

reviews.review_heading: Review of S.M. Shetty College.
reviews.review_text: There is an event known as "Talent Hunt" for students every year. There is an event known as Emmozeal where well-known Bollywood stars come as chief guests. This function runs for three days. We have a good library with Wi-Fi and good classrooms. No hostel on campus. The canteen of our college is awesome with all sorts of food items. We have waiters in the canteen.

reviews.review_heading: Review of S.M. Shetty College.
reviews.review_text: Yes, we have very good IT labs for our practical practice in the IT field. We have a total of 4 labs, and 2 lab assistants take care of each lab infrastructure. All the systems are highly configured, and students can take study material from the library. We do not have any hostel, but our canteen is very good. However, we have a complaint about the campus; it is too small.

reviews.review_heading: Students can take admission to this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good. Classrooms are air-conditioned. I am a day scholar so I do not know about hostel facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Review of S.M. Shetty College of Science, Commerce and Management Studies.
reviews.review_text: We have a better Wi-Fi facility. We have good and air-conditioned classrooms. Our canteen is good. The food served in our canteen is average. There is a ground in our college for sports. The campus has 9 floors.

reviews.review_heading: The faculty is very nice and it offers various job opportunities to the students.
reviews.review_text: The ambience of the college is really good and one can get really comfortable with the college. The classrooms are very nice and have a different vibe and one can focus while studying. The college also has different facilities like library and IT labs which are maintained very nicely and provided with the latest facilities.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is amazing. Every year, various things are installed in the college. It is fully air-conditioned with the newest educational technology and attendance scanning devices. Classrooms are organised and clean. The library is huge and provides multiple books by various authors as well as academic books.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with faculty members and infrastructure of our college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Each class is equipped with two air-conditioners and one projector. A library is also fully air-conditioned. There are fifteen computers available for students. There is also a free Wi-Fi service in the college. There is no hostel available. The food served in the canteen is good. This college also provides a healthcare facility.

reviews.review_heading: Fantastic infrastructure and faculty.
reviews.review_text: This college spends a lot of money on infrastructure. They have spent a great amount of money on making the college look very aesthetically pleasing. Every classroom has 2 ACs. There is also public Wi-Fi available there. The library has an ample amount of books. There is no hostel available in the college. The canteen of the college is also good and has a lively atmosphere. The college also has a Mental Health professional available for the students.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Metallurgical Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: It is the best college for diploma course.

review_content.Placements: About 75% of students get placed every year. The placement record is nice in our college and you can check it on our college website. The highest salary package offered is 1 LPA and the average salary package offered is 0.4 LPA. Bajaj Motor, Tata, According Cement, etc., visit our college for placements as well as internships. Around 50% of students started internships in their 2nd year.
review_content.Infrastructure: I like the college buildings and my course. Campus is peaceful and surrounded by green areas. I love the location, the facilities, and the looks of the university. I am getting along with all the people I meet and have good relationships as well. I also love the study room in our hostel. Our college has Wi-Fi for students and faculty members.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Mechatronics - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Government Polytechnic College, Sadar Nagpur.

review_content.Placements: The criteria for getting qualified on the campus is that we have to clear the fifth semester. There must be no backlogs in the fifth semester. A lot of companies like Ultra Tech, Tata Steel, JSW Steel, Maruti Suzuki, TCS, Infosys, Bajaj, Mahindra, L & T, etc., visit the college for campus placement. Many reputed companies come to the college. If you are not selected, you will attend the campus placements organised by other colleges. The internship is very good. The college provides the company and gives experience of the working environment. Students can do an internship as well if they want to, as some companies offer an internship program. The internship duration is more than 6 to 12 months. About 10 to 15 students got placements from our batch. We get good internship opportunities here.

overview_faqs.question: Is Government Polytechnic College, Sadar worth considering?
overview_faqs.answer: Government Polytechnic College, Sadar is a prestigious institution that offers After 10th Diploma, UG Diploma programs. Students have the option to enroll in these courses to start their careers in the Engineering, Hospitality & Travel, Design field. The institute is renowned for its dedicated and experienced faculty members who are committed to delivering these programs. Government Polytechnic College, Sadar has earned a remarkable review rating of 4.2 based on student feedback at Shiksha. Furthermore, it has received ratings of 4.33 for Campus Life, 3.67 for Placements, 4.33 for Faculty, and 4 for Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Government Polytechnic College, Sadar Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: It's the best Diploma College in Nagpur.

content.Placements: After 6 semesters, students are eligible for campus placement. Several companies that came are Tata, Mahindra, and Autolive, which offered 3 to 4 LPA. The highest package is 4-5 LPA, I really don't know the company. The lowest package is 2.5 LPA. The percentage of students getting placements is less, it's almost 20-30%. My plan after getting the degree is to do engineering.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel Facilities: Hostels are good. Mess is available in the hostel. Good bathrooms. Good rooms. In one room, 2 students are there. The main GATE closes at 10 am. There are many rooms available for rent near the college campus. Many students stay in rented rooms near the college.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Our college is very good as it provides excellent knowledge to students.

content.Placements: Around 20-30 students get placed with an average salary package. Companies like Tata Project, Shapoorji Pallonji, and L&T offer placements. The average salary package offered was 2.5 LPA, and the highest salary package was 3.25 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The classrooms, benches, desks, and lab equipment are old. The library is good. Wi-Fi is available sometimes. Hostel is average. We can play any sport here. The college provides funds to play at the state level. The canteen is good, and cleanliness is maintained.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Metallurgical Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: It is the best college for diploma course.

content.Placements: About 75% of students get placed every year. The placement record is nice in our college and you can check it on our college website. The highest salary package offered is 1 LPA and the average salary package offered is 0.4 LPA. Bajaj Motor, Tata, According Cement, etc., visit our college for placements as well as internships. Around 50% of students started internships in their 2nd year.
content.Infrastructure: I like the college buildings and my course. Campus is peaceful and surrounded by green areas. I love the location, the facilities, and the looks of the university. I am getting along with all the people I meet and have good relationships as well. I also love the study room in our hostel. Our college has Wi-Fi for students and faculty members.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Mechatronics - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Review of Government Polytechnic College, Sadar Nagpur.

content.Placements: The criteria for getting qualified on the campus is that we have to clear the fifth semester. There must be no backlogs in the fifth semester. A lot of companies like Ultra Tech, Tata Steel, JSW Steel, Maruti Suzuki, TCS, Infosys, Bajaj, Mahindra, L & T, etc., visit the college for campus placement. Many reputed companies come to the college. If you are not selected, you will attend the campus placements organised by other colleges. The internship is very good. The college provides the company and gives experience of the working environment. Students can do an internship as well if they want to, as some companies offer an internship program. The internship duration is more than 6 to 12 months. About 10 to 15 students got placements from our batch. We get good internship opportunities here.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: When I came in the beginning, we did not get good food in this college, but now their is a canteen.

content.Placements: Students need good marks in 12th to get admission to the college. This salary package is an average one that everyone gets. I have very good companies offering me internships when I get good marks. Very good companies come here. My highest job salary package is Rs. 40,000 per month.
content.Infrastructure: There are lots of facilities here. It is a very good college. Labs and classrooms are very good. Rooms are very big. The library is also good. All the food here is good. The canteen is quite big. I like it a lot. The food here is good, and there are a lot of sports activities available.

faqs.answer: The best choice depends on your career aspirations:· If you want to become a teacher: Opt for a B.Ed. It's the mandatory qualification for teaching in most schools.· If you want to pursue a career in research or a science-related field: A BSc would be more suitable. It provides a strong foundation for further studies and specialised careers.· If you're unsure: Consider your interests and skills. Do you enjoy teaching and interacting with students? Or are you more drawn to scientific exploration and research? Additional options:· M.Ed.: If you already have a B.Ed., you can pursue a Master of Education for career advancement or specialisation in a particular teaching area.· Diploma courses: Various specialised Diploma courses in education or related fields can enhance your skills and knowledge.
